name: Chris Foley Golf School
address: 1664 Pine Beach Rd, East Gull Lake, MN 56401
about: Chris Foley Golf Schools is a premier golf instruction facility dedicated to increasing enjoyment of the game through a holistic program. Their offerings include comprehensive golf lessons, club fitting services, course management instruction, and coverage of rules and etiquette, all tailored to individual goals and ability levels. The facility is equipped with advanced technology, including TrackMan launch monitors and JC Video Swing Analysis Software, to provide detailed feedback for accelerated learning. Following sessions, students gain access to their lesson videos and summary notes for continued practice at home.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional instruction from a PGA Master Professional
Use of premium TrackMan technology for detailed swing and shot analysis
Holistic program covering swing mechanics, short game, and course strategy
Online access to lesson videos and notes for continued practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitor used for instruction and simulator sessions.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best fitting and practice experience. Club fitting services are available to optimize your equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information on BYOB policies. It is best to contact the facility directly to inquire about bringing outside food or beverages.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator session. A standard TrackMan simulator session is listed as 2 hours for $80.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chris Foley Golf Schools offers dedicated junior golf programs, individual instruction for youth, and group coaching sessions specifically for kids and teens.
